title: Asset management giant Invesco files for tokenized fund targeting stablecoin reserve market
summary: The $2.5 trillion asset manager deepens its blockchain push after taking over Superstate's tokenized money market fund as fund manager earlier this year.

title: Coinbase's Base blockchain resumes after two-hour outage disrupted network
summary: The incident temporarily halted transaction processing on one of Ethereum's largest layer-2 networks.

title: Strategy's yield-generating STRC stock is more correlated with BTC than ever
summary: The tightening correlation undermines STRC's appeal as a relatively steadier income vehicle.

title: Kraken in talks to buy 15% stake in DeFi lender Aave at $385 million valuation
summary: The DeFi lender is rebuilding after the fallout from April's KelpDAO exploit sparked a multibillion-dollar exodus of deposits despite Aave itself not being hacked.

title: a16z-backed crypto firm rebrands, shifts focus to solving AI’s global copyright headache
summary: The startup formerly known as Story Protocol raised $140 million to secure internet rights and is now building an audit layer for data consent, licensing, and provenance for tech firms.
